name: Lemon Coriander Crescents
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Theresa Grant -- Hwwk11b
DESCRIPTION: The lemony flavor of coriander enhances the fresh lemon taste of these tender cookies.
In a large mixing bowl, beat butter until softened. Add 1/3 cup sifted powdered sugar and beat until fluffy. Add lemon peel, lemon juice, and coriander; beat well. Add flour; beat until well mixed. Preheat oven to 325°F. Shape into 1 1/2-inch long by 1/2-inch wide logs. Curve each log into a crescent shape, tapering the ends. Place on ungreased baking sheets and bake for 18-20 minutes or until done. Remove from oven and cool.
In a plastic bag, gently shake a few cookies at a time with 1/3 cup powdered sugar.
STORAGE: Store airtight for 1 week; freeze for up to three months.
